item.title: Bid deadline looms for neglected Nova Scotia offshore play
item.description: Canada government and province say current call for bids will be the first of many

item.title: US Gulf drillers now free to ignore key endangered species law
item.description: US government exempting oil and gas activity in US Gulf from Endangered Species Act compliance

item.title: Brazilian player wins $515 million vessel contracts with Petrobras
item.description: Belov Engenharia to supply four SDSVs to aid operations offshore Brazil

item.title: Fugro wins Petrobras contract for Brazil’s first offshore wind project
item.description: Pilot plant will be implemented off the coast of Rio de Janeiro state

item.title: SLB OneSubsea forging ahead with 2026 plans amid Middle East volatility
item.description: CEO tells Upstream that dialogues with customers ‘continue as they are’ in long-cycle business

item.title: Kazakhstan readies major exploration offerings for international majors
item.description: State player KazMunayGaz is offering 22 onshore and offshore blocks that could hold in-place resources of over 34 million barrels of oil equivalent

item.title: Golar LNG will consider sale or merger as part of strategic review
item.description: Goldman Sachs appointed to explore strategic alternatives for floating LNG specialist

item.title: ReconAfrica begins crucial well testing operations onshore Namibia
item.description: Junior company hopes production tests on frontier Kavango West-1X probe will be successful

item.title: Fire breaks out on oil tanker after attack offshore Dubai
item.description: Tanker and container ship report attacks as US presses Iran to agree to a peace deal

item.title: CCS milestone reached on FPSO operating offshore Angola
item.description: The Agogo FPSO owned by Yinson Production is operating offshore Angola

item.title: Eco appoints exploration veteran as new chair
item.description: Former Africa Oil boss now leads junior player's board

item.title: Japex drills potentially game-changing offshore well
item.description: Discovered gas volumes could reduce Japan’s dependence on imported LNG

item.title: CNOOC Ltd achieves record production in 2025
item.description: CNOOC Limited continues multibillion-dollar capital expenditure to boost exploration

item.title: Philippines procures Russian oil to avert supply shortages
item.description: Long-term US ally has declared a national ‘energy emergency’

item.title: Timor-Leste offshore development steps closer to FID
item.description: Finder Energy receives key approval for Kuda Tasi and Jahal oilfields project

item.title: Petronas denies Philippines fuel deal
item.description: Philippines provincial governor had hailed talks with a representative of the King of Malaysia

item.title: Jadestone's Stag offshore oilfield facilities damaged by Cyclone Narelle
item.description: Production remains shut in as operator assesses impact while developing repair plans

item.title: FPSO impairments underpin Bumi Armada's planned share buy-back
item.description: Malaysian company wants to address past accumulated losses via planned capital reduction

item.title: IEA launches 'energy crisis' summary of responses to Middle East war
item.description: The new online tool tracks government measures to conserve energy and give consumers price relief

item.title: US LNG terminal delayed by contractor bankruptcy reaches first production
item.description: Golden Pass set to begin exports later this quarter

item.title: Petrobras wins licence for three-well campaign in Brazil’s equatorial margin
item.description: Drilling of Mae de Ouro exploration well is earmarked for the second half of 2026

item.title: Chevron and QatarEnergy acquire stakes in Uruguay offshore blocks
item.description: All offshore acreage in South American nation is currently contracted

item.title: Capricorn stock up as Egypt parliament ratifies key licence deal
item.description: Approval paves way for petroleum minister to sign favourable concession deal

item.title: Mopane resource estimate soars to 1.4 billion barrels of oil equivalent
item.description: Galp Energia reports 57% increase in contingent resources of big Namibia discovery

item.title: TotalEnergies completes merger of UK North Sea business
item.description: French energy giant has combined with Repsol-HitecVision vehicle

item.title: Russia hits Ukraine gas fields in response to Baltic oil terminal fires
item.description: Kyiv and Moscow step on efforts to undermine energy supplies as frontline enters stalemate

item.title: Critical Angola drilling campaign to start in 'coming days'
item.description: Block partners sign deal to use jack-up under contract to operator Sonangol

item.title: UK regulator calls for more emissions data for Rosebank and Jackdaw fields
item.description: Scope 3 emissions data was submitted for the Rosebank and Jackdaw fields last year

item.title: UK-listed player's merger plans face challenge from beneficial shareholder
item.description: Falcon Oil & Gas and Tamboran Resources trying to complete merger

item.title: Woodside resumes loading at Australian LNG project
item.description: Operator working to restore normal production following ex-Tropical Cyclone Narelle
